title: Compliance Analyst
description: Bank of America, America's largest bank, seeks a Compliance Analyst for our Kansas City operations center. You'll monitor transactions, assess regulatory risks, and ensure our operations meet stringent federal and state compliance requirements. Work onsite in a structured environment where you'll contribute to BofA's mission of managing systemic financial risk.
responsibilities: Monitor financial transactions and flag suspicious activity for investigation
Review customer accounts and documentation for compliance with regulatory requirements
Prepare compliance reports and audit materials for internal and external regulators
Maintain transaction monitoring systems and update compliance procedures
Coordinate with multiple departments to address compliance issues
Participate in regulatory examinations and respond to audit findings

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or related field
skills: Understanding of banking compliance and Anti-Money Laundering (AML) regulations
Proficiency in SQL or financial systems
Ability to handle sensitive information confidentially

benefits: Health, dental, vision, life, and disability insurance
